$schema_note: Workspace-scoped Claude Code settings for sec-research/. These hooks layer ON TOP OF the global ~/.claude/settings.json hookify hooks; they do not replace them. Hook paths resolve via ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}, which resolves to this directory when Claude is launched here directly (the supported standalone mode). Opening Claude from a parent directory will NOT discover or load these hooks. NOTE: Forward slashes in the literal path portion are intentional — backslash-followed-by-alpha (e.g., \h, \u) gets eaten by bash/sh shell parsing, mangling the path. Python on Windows accepts mixed separators, so forward slashes work everywhere without shell-escape pitfalls.

_workspace_invariants_summary.scope_bounded: Every network call, file write outside this dir, and target identifier must trace back to a loaded programs/<slug>/scope.yaml. No exceptions without a signed override.
_workspace_invariants_summary.evidence_grounded: No claim ships without Citation+Proof+runnable-PoC. Extends citation-seeker.
_workspace_invariants_summary.human_gated: Every submission requires a human-signed approval token. Drafts auto; sends never.
